_note: Label Sprint round for excretory — generated excretory_illus.webp, cropped/keyed dark mode.
alt: Human excretory system — kidneys, ureters, and bladder
caption: Tap each label, then tap where it belongs on the excretory system.

hotspots.label: Kidney
hotspots.detail: Filters blood to form urine; bean-shaped, one on each side of the spine.

hotspots.label: Renal artery and vein
hotspots.detail: Carry blood to and from each kidney.

hotspots.label: Ureter
hotspots.detail: The tube that carries urine from each kidney down to the bladder.

hotspots.label: Urinary bladder
hotspots.detail: A muscular sac that stores urine until it is released.

hotspots.label: Urethra
hotspots.detail: The tube that carries urine out of the bladder to outside the body.

generation_prompt: human excretory system, kidneys ureters bladder, body silhouette
